_case: no lockfile at all — installStage prints SKIP to stderr (not stdout — parity with bash's `>&2`) and returns without invoking a PM. Compose stage still runs and reports 'none found.' on stdout. The stderr line embeds the fix-src absolute path, which the sanitize pass collapses to <FIX_SRC>.

expected.stderr: SKIP: no lockfile in <FIX_SRC> — nothing to install.
